rationale: Exceptionally clear and well-organized explainer. The IOU analogy, concrete dollar figures ($5,000 minimums, $100 million plant, $500 billion in 2023), and the GO vs. revenue bond distinction give it real specificity. The voice is warm and conversational ('jacking up taxes,' 'you name it') without being flippant. Minor dings: the $500 billion figure may be slightly off (actual 2023 issuance was closer to $380-390B), and the closing paragraph is slightly redundant with what came before. But overall this is an excellent plain-English explainer that hits every mark the prompt asks for.
